---
title: "About"
subtitle: "How this site is put together"
---

This page is a normal Quarto document linked from the navigation bar.

## Structure

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `_quarto.yml` | Site title, navbar, theme, and shared HTML options |
| `index.qmd` | Home page |
| `about.qmd` | This page |
| `styles.scss` | Extra colors and layout tweaks |

## Next steps

- Add figures, citations, or code chunks to any `.qmd` file.
- Change `theme` under `format.html` in `_quarto.yml` (e.g. `minty`, `flatly`, `sandstone`).
- Turn on **search** by adding `search: true` under `website` in `_quarto.yml` if your Quarto version supports it.
